name: Deep Endurance: Trip Planning Session (28 turns)
description: 28-turn trip planning session. Trip details (destination, dates, budget, companion) stored in turns 1-4. 20 turns of planning activity follow before deep recall tests at turns 23-28. Realistic voice-assistant session that generates verbose responses (summaries, lists) to accumulate tokens faster. Late recall turns 23-26 assert content only (no tool_call requirement) to capture the context-bypass pattern: at late turns the model answers correctly from conversation context without calling recall tools.

turns.user: Remember that I'm planning a trip to Lisbon.
Remember that the trip is from June 10th to June 20th.
Remember that my travel budget is 3000 dollars.
Remember that I'm traveling with my friend Marco.
Create a packing list and add my passport and travel adapter.
Add sunscreen, light jacket, and walking shoes to the packing list.
What time is it?
Create a restaurants list and add Taberna da Rua das Flores.
How much is 3000 divided by 10 days?
Set a 10-minute timer — I need to book the flight.
Add Pasteis de Belem and Time Out Market to the restaurants list.
Add camera and extra memory cards to the packing list.
What's today's date?
Create a todo list and add book flights and reserve hotel.
What's on my packing list so far?
What is 15 percent of 300 — that's the tip estimate for restaurants.
Add book airport transfers to the todo list.
List my running timers.
Add travel insurance and currency exchange to my todo list.
How many days until June 10th? Today's date should help.
Show me my restaurants list.
Add voltage converter to the packing list.
Where am I going on my trip?
When does the trip start and end?
Who am I traveling with?
What is my travel budget?
Give me a complete summary — everything you remember about my trip.
Show me my complete todo list.
